title: Nandyal Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Nandyal with a Z-Score of +5.51. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Nandyal is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 18.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 40% and the wind speed is moderate at 12.9 km/h. 
 The Heat Wave is expected to continue, with no expected relief in the form of cooler temperatures, as indicated by a Heating Degree Day (HDD) value of 0.0 GG.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately
